label: capability search • skill • abstain on chit-chat
notes: Symmetric with `capability_search.abstain-greeting` (tools) and `method-abstain` (methods). All 9 built-in skills are universally searchable, so abstain has the full opportunity to mis-match against a realistic catalog. RRF saturation under PR-B will apply to skills the same way it does to tools — if this case fails after PR-B, mark it as known-tracking in `recall_floors.json` rather than tightening the threshold.
